title: La Opala is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: La Opala is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
